sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports experiencing intermittent dizziness, particularly when changing positions quickly. He denies any chest pain, shortness of breath, or palpitations. He also states he's been feeling lightheaded.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 118/72 mmHg, heart rate is 78 bpm, and the patient appears well-oriented. Neurological exam is unremarkable.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's reported dizziness suggests a possible orthostatic hypotension or benign positional vertigo. Further evaluation is warranted to rule out other causes.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: I will order a tilt table test to evaluate for orthostatic intolerance. I will also recommend increasing fluid intake and avoiding rapid position changes.
